benchmark_first_rules: Do not claim reusable code-method confidence without a persisted benchmark or trust-ready operation artifact.
operator_checkpoint_rules: Raise an operator checkpoint when benchmark mismatch or validation-route ambiguity changes the bounded route.
Require explicit human approval before any L2 promotion of a topic-skill projection.
Translate continue/branch/redirect answers into durable steering artifacts before deeper execution continues.
forbidden_proxies: Do not treat polished prose, hidden assumptions, or memory-only agreement as proof.
Do not silently widen scope without updating this contract.
Do not skip a restart from source intake when the blocker is really a missing source, citation chain, or prior-work comparison.
Do not treat raw code changes, unreviewed configs, or prose-only workflow descriptions as a reusable topic-skill projection.
Do not claim broader workflow portability before the benchmark-first gate and operation-trust audit are both satisfied.

benchmark_first_rules: Do not claim reusable code-method confidence without a persisted benchmark or trust-ready operation artifact.

forbidden_proxies: Do not treat polished prose, hidden assumptions, or memory-only agreement as proof.
Do not silently widen scope without updating this contract.
Do not skip a restart from source intake when the blocker is really a missing source, citation chain, or prior-work comparison.
Do not treat raw code changes, unreviewed configs, or prose-only workflow descriptions as a reusable topic-skill projection.
Do not claim broader workflow portability before the benchmark-first gate and operation-trust audit are both satisfied.
